ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of holding and playing a video game controller.  The robot will mimic the hand movements of a person engrossed in a game.  The sequence will emphasize the focused, engaged nature of playing.  I'll use slight variations in arm and wrist positions to create a dynamic yet controlled motion.  The left arm will be used as the 'supporting' arm, while the right arm will do most of the expressive work.

frames.beat: arms hold an invisible controller, ready to play
right hand grips and moves, fingers dancing
a moment of pause, the controller held steady
right hand shifts, buttons are pressed with a flick
